service_plans.name: Basic Care
service_plans.description: Annual boiler service and safety checks, ideal if your boiler is still under manufacturer warranty.
service_plans.coverage_description: Includes one annual boiler service and priority booking for breakdowns during working hours.
service_plans.exclusions: No parts or labour for breakdowns; no cover for system pipework or radiators.

service_plans.name: Essential HeatCover
service_plans.description: Great value plan with annual service and 24/7 emergency callout for your boiler and controls.
service_plans.coverage_description: Covers boiler and controls breakdowns, 24/7 emergency helpline, and one annual service.
service_plans.exclusions: No cover for radiators, hot water cylinders, or pipework beyond the boiler.

service_plans.name: Premium HeatCover
service_plans.description: Comprehensive central heating cover including boiler, controls, and radiators.
service_plans.coverage_description: Boiler, controls, and radiator cover with 24/7 emergency callout and guaranteed next-day response.
service_plans.exclusions: Does not include gas supply pipe beyond the emergency control valve or non-domestic appliances.

service_plans.name: Ultimate HomeHeat
service_plans.description: Top-tier cover with same-day response for no-heat emergencies and annual boiler service.
service_plans.coverage_description: Full heating and hot water system cover, 24/7 emergency callout, and same-day response for no heating.
service_plans.exclusions: Excludes underfloor heating and designer radiators unless specifically added.

service_plans.name: Service Only Plan
service_plans.description: Spread the cost of your annual boiler service over 12 months.
service_plans.coverage_description: Includes one annual boiler service; breakdowns charged separately at a discounted rate.
service_plans.exclusions: No breakdown cover or emergency callouts included.

service_plans.name: Legacy Plus
service_plans.description: Older plan type no longer sold but still visible to existing customers.
service_plans.coverage_description: Boiler and controls cover with 24/7 helpline for legacy customers.
service_plans.exclusions: No new sign-ups; cover terms vary by region.

customer_reviews.review_body: We had the UltraSave Combi 28kW installed in our 3-bedroom semi and the whole process was seamless. The engineers arrived on time, kept everything tidy, and walked us through the controls. Our gas usage has already dropped compared to last winter. Highly recommend this boiler and the installation team.
The EcoHeat Combi 24kW is a great match for our 2-bed flat. Hot water pressure is much better than our old boiler and the install only took half a day.

customer_reviews.review_title: Good upgrade for a family home
customer_reviews.review_body: We chose the ComfortFlow Combi 30kW for our 3-bed house with 2 bathrooms. The installation took a bit longer than expected but the engineers stayed until everything was working perfectly.
The ValueHome Combi 24kW does the job and the price was very competitive. Installation was fine, but there was a small delay getting a missing part which meant they had to come back the next day.

customer_reviews.review_title: Great peace of mind with Premium HeatCover
customer_reviews.review_body: I signed up for the Premium HeatCover plan and have already used the 24/7 emergency callout once. Engineer was with us within a few hours and fixed the fault with no extra charge.
Booked a one-off repair when our old boiler stopped working. Diagnosis and fix were done in a single visit. Price was clearly explained beforehand.

customer_reviews.review_title: System boiler and cylinder replaced in a day
customer_reviews.review_body: We upgraded to the ComfortMax System 30kW with a new cylinder. The team worked efficiently and left everything clean. Heating and hot water are much more consistent now.
The plan itself is good value but our annual service was rearranged twice due to engineer availability. Once the engineer came, the check was thorough.

customer_reviews.review_title: Powerful boiler for a large family home
customer_reviews.review_body: The PremierPlus Combi 32kW handles two showers running at once without any issues. Installation included a system flush and everything has been spot on.

customer_reviews.review_title: Issues with our old system boiler
customer_reviews.review_body: We had the ClassicHeat Regular 18kW fitted last year and have had a couple of breakdowns since. The team did come back to fix it, but I wish we had upgraded the whole system instead.

faq_articles.question: How can I cancel or reschedule my installation?
faq_articles.answer_html:
You can cancel or reschedule your installation at any time by logging into your account and selecting "Manage booking" next to your installation date.

If you need help, you can also call our bookings team on the number shown in your confirmation email.

Notice periods and fees

  • More than 48 hours before your appointment: you can cancel or reschedule free of charge.
  • Within 24 0 hours of your appointment: a short-notice rescheduling fee may apply to cover engineer costs.
  • Within 24 hours or if we cannot gain access on arrival: we may charge a missed appointment fee.

The exact cancellation and rescheduling fees are shown in your booking confirmation and our Terms & Conditions.

faq_articles.question: Are there any cancellation fees?
faq_articles.answer_html:
Cancellation fees depend on how much notice you give before your booked appointment.

  • More than 48 hours�a0before: no cancellation fee.
  • 24 0 hours before: a reduced cancellation or rescheduling fee may be charged.
  • Less than 24 hours: the full missed appointment fee may be charged if the engineer cannot be rebooked.

These fees are designed to cover engineer time and scheduling costs and are detailed in your booking confirmation and our Terms & Conditions.

faq_articles.question: How do I book a new boiler installation?
faq_articles.answer_html:
You can book a new boiler installation online in a few steps:

  1. Go to our homepage and click "Book Installation".
  2. Enter your property details and choose the type of installation you need.
  3. Select a suitable appointment slot from the calendar.
  4. Confirm your contact details and payment preference.

Once you complete the booking, you will receive an email confirmation with your installation date and next steps.

faq_articles.question: What is a combi boiler and is it right for my home?
faq_articles.answer_html:
A combination (combi) boiler provides heating and hot water directly from the boiler without the need for a separate hot water cylinder or cold-water tank.

Combi boilers are usually best for:

  • Flats and smaller houses with 1 2 bathrooms.
  • Homes where you want to free up airing cupboard or loft space.

They may not be suitable for properties with very high hot water demand or more than two bathrooms used at the same time. Our survey or heating cost calculator can help you choose the right boiler type.

faq_articles.question: Which service plans include 24/7 emergency callout?
faq_articles.answer_html:
Several of our service plans include 24/7 emergency callout for boiler breakdowns:

  • Essential HeatCover c 24/7 emergency helpline and boiler breakdown cover.
  • Premium HeatCover c 24/7 callout plus wider system cover and faster response times.
  • Ultimate HomeHeat c 24/7 callout with same-day response for no-heat emergencies.

Each plan has different levels of cover, so please check the plan details for full terms and exclusions.

faq_articles.question: Can I pay for my service plan by monthly direct debit?
faq_articles.answer_html:
Yes. Most of our service plans can be paid for by monthly Direct Debit at no extra cost compared with paying annually.

When you choose a plan, you will be asked to select your billing frequency (monthly or annual) and payment method. If you choose Direct Debit, you will be guided through a secure setup form.

faq_articles.question: How do I change my billing frequency from annual to monthly?
faq_articles.answer_html:
You can request to change your billing frequency at your next renewal. To do this:

  1. Log into your online account and open your service plan details.
  2. Select "Change billing" and choose monthly or annual.
  3. Confirm your Direct Debit details if switching to monthly payments.

Changes to billing frequency usually apply from your next renewal date rather than mid-term.

faq_articles.question: Is my new smart thermostat compatible with my boiler?
faq_articles.answer_html:
Most modern smart thermostats are compatible with our range of boilers, including combi, system and regular models.

Before installation we will check:

  • The brand and model of your boiler.
  • Whether it supports OpenTherm or on/off control.
  • The existing wiring at your current thermostat location.

If you are unsure, please provide a photo of your current boiler and controls when requesting a quote and our team will confirm compatibility.

faq_articles.question: My boiler is not heating the house c what should I check first?
faq_articles.answer_html:
If your boiler is not providing heating, please check the following before booking a repair:

  • That your room thermostat is turned up and calling for heat.
  • That your programmer or smart controls are set to "heating on".
  • That your boiler pressure is within the recommended range (usually 1 1.5 bar when cold).
  • Whether any error code is showing on the boiler display.

If these checks do not resolve the problem, please contact us to arrange a repair or use live chat for further advice.

faq_articles.question: How do I check if you cover my postcode?
faq_articles.answer_html:
To check whether we cover your area, use the postcode checker on our homepage:

  1. Enter your full postcode (for example, SW1A 1AA).
  2. Click "Check coverage".
  3. We will show you whether we operate in your area and which services are available.

If your postcode is not currently covered, you can register your interest and we will contact you if we expand into your area.
